subcodes.first_line: This Day is crying out these words, and likewise are the sun announcing them and the moon bearing their glad tidings
subcodes.first_line_orig: روز ندا مینماید و آفتاب مژده میدهد و ماه بشارت میگوید ای دوستان خداوند آگاه آمد
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
